attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
EL.TRANS_ID AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
EL.ID AS SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT,
EL.BOOKING_FLAG AS DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG,
EL.ACTIVE_FLAG AS ACTIVE_FLG,
EL.CREATED_DATE AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
CAST(EL.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,
EL.CREATED_BY AS SRC_CREATED_PROCESS_NAME,
EL.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
CAST(EL.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,
EL.LAST_UPDATED_BY AS SRC_UPDATED_PROCESS_NAME,
EL.DERIVED_QUOTE_NUMBER AS SRC_RPTD_QUOTE_NUM,
EL.DERIVED_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM,
EL.DERIVED_QUOTE_LINE_ID AS SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
EL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EL.MATCH_TYPE AS MATCHING_MTHD_FOR_TAGGING_NAME,
EL.ORDER_HEADER_ID AS SRC_RPTD_ERP_SO_HEADER_ID,
EL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID AS SRC_RPTD_ERP_QUOTE_HEADER_ID,
EL.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REVENUE_SRC_CD,
EL.SALES_MOTION_CD AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
EL.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT AS SPLIT_PCT,
EL.PO_EXISTS_FLG AS PO_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG AS PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG AS PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG AS QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG AS QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG AS QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,
EL.MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG AS MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG,
EL.MULTIPLE_MATCH_FLG AS LINKED_TO_MULTIPLE_SOL_FLG,
EL.APPROVED_ERP_LINKAGE_FLG AS SOFTWARE_OR_SERVICE_FLG,
EL.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
POS.BK_ORIG_POS_TRX_ID_INT AS ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
POS.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE AS MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
POS.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY AS RU_REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM AS RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT AS RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC AS RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST(EL.START_TV_DTM AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
CAST(EL.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT
FROM
(SELECT * FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_ALL
WHERE
END_TV_DTM >= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRANS_ID,SALES_MOTION_CD,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY ID DESC)=1)EL
INNER JOIN (SELECT
BK_ORIG_POS_TRX_ID_INT
,MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE
,REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM
,SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT
,SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1 )POS
ON EL.TRANS_ID=POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
WHERE EL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
